skills.name: aoa-change-protocol
skills.summary: Plan and execute a bounded repository change with explicit verification and reporting.
skills.workflow_short: State the goal, keep the diff scoped, and verify explicitly.
skills.inputs_short: Needs: target goal, touched files, main risk, validation path.
skills.outputs_short: Produces: explicit plan, scoped change, named verification result.
skills.verification_short: Checks: confirm a plan existed, the change stayed scoped, and verification was explicit.
